allow: Bash(node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\);process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{const j=JSON.parse\(d\);const u=j.rows.find\(r=>r.name==='测试用户'\);if\(u\)console.log\('password:',u.password,'\\nplain:',u.password_plain\);else console.log\('not found'\)}\)")

Bash(node -e "const m=require\('mysql2/promise'\);\(async\(\)=>{const p=m.createPool\({host:'101.33.242.241',port:3306,database:'mysql_mulpro',user:'sa',password:'20040821chen',charset:'utf8mb4',connectionLimit:1}\);const[r]=await p.query\(\\"SELECT id,name,password,password_plain FROM users WHERE name='\\\\u6d4b\\\\u8bd5\\\\u7528\\\\u6237'\\"\);console.log\(r[0]\);await p.end\(\)}\)\(\);")

Bash(node -e "const m=require\('mysql2/promise'\);const b=require\('bcryptjs'\);\(async\(\)=>{const p=m.createPool\({host:'101.33.242.241',port:3306,database:'mysql_mulpro',user:'sa',password:'20040821chen',charset:'utf8mb4',connectionLimit:1}\);const hash=await b.hash\('mypwd',10\);await p.execute\(\\"INSERT INTO users \(uuid,name,password,password_plain,email\) VALUES \(?,?,?,?,?\)\\",[require\('crypto'\).randomUUID\(\),'测试用户',hash,'mypwd','test@test.com']\);const[r]=await p.query\('SELECT id,name,password,password_plain FROM users WHERE id=\(SELECT MAX\(id\) FROM users\)'\);console.log\('id:',r[0].id,'name:',r[0].name,'hash:',r[0].password,'plain:',r[0].password_plain\);await p.end\(\)}\)\(\);")

Bash(node -e "const m=require\('mysql2/promise'\);\(async\(\)=>{const p=m.createPool\({host:'101.33.242.241',port:3306,database:'mysql_mulpro',user:'sa',password:'20040821chen',charset:'utf8mb4',connectionLimit:1}\);await p.execute\('DELETE FROM users WHERE id=6'\);await p.execute\('ALTER TABLE users AUTO_INCREMENT=8'\);console.log\('cleaned'\);await p.end\(\)}\)\(\);")

Bash(node -e "const m=require\('mysql2/promise'\);\(async\(\)=>{const p=m.createPool\({host:'101.33.242.241',port:3306,database:'mysql_mulpro',user:'sa',password:'20040821chen',charset:'utf8mb4',connectionLimit:1}\);const[r]=await p.query\('SELECT password,password_plain FROM users WHERE id=7'\);console.log\('hash:',r[0].password.substring\(0,50\)+'...'\);console.log\('plain:',r[0].password_plain\);await p.end\(\)}\)\(\);")

Bash(node -e "const m=require\('mysql2/promise'\);const b=require\('bcryptjs'\);\(async\(\)=>{const p=m.createPool\({host:'101.33.242.241',port:3306,database:'mysql_mulpro',user:'sa',password:'20040821chen',charset:'utf8mb4',connectionLimit:1}\);const[r]=await p.query\('SELECT password,password_plain FROM users WHERE id=7'\);const ok=await b.compare\(r[0].password_plain,r[0].password\);console.log\('verify match:',ok\);await p.end\(\)}\)\(\);")
